summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled; maintainer review/proof/check gates block any stronger action. One linked security-sensitive historical PR is quarantined only as a non-mutating route_security action.

actions.reason: Route the exact security-sensitive linked ref to central OpenClaw security handling without affecting unrelated inventory PRs.
